title: Department Manager Vacancy at Metro Shoes Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Metro Shoes Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Metro Shoes Advisory Limited! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Ranchi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Metro Shoes Advisory Limited:
Metro Shoes Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Metro Shoes Advisory Limited!
